mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SeminarTokenDAO.selectAccessToken 설 명 : 세미나 OAuth 토큰 정보 조회 */ SELECT TKN_ID AS tokenId, TKN_EML AS tcEmail, CNTN_PRM_TKN AS accesToken, TKN_EXPYMD AS expireIn, (TRUNC((TO_DATE(TKN_EXPYMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - SYSDATE) * 24 * 60) - 5) AS expireMin, UPDT_TKN AS refreshToken, UPDT_TKN_EXPYMD AS refreshExpireIn, (TRUNC((TO_DATE(UPDT_TKN_EXPYMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - SYSDATE) * 24 * 60) - 5) AS reExpireMin, RGTR_ID AS rgtrId, FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_ZOOM_TKN WHERE TKN_EML = #{tcEmail}

/* SQL ID : SeminarTokenDAO.countByCreCrs 설 명 : 세미나 OAuth 토큰 여부 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(A.USER_ID) FROM SBJCT_PROF A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.RPRSYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT AS C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_SMNR_ZOOM_TKN AS D ON ( B.EMAIL = D.TKN_EML OR B.TKN_EML = D.TKN_EML ) WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
